name: dotclaude
description: Agent conventions, skills, and tooling for full-stack TypeScript projects.

interface.shortDescription: Agent conventions, skills, and tooling for TypeScript projects.
interface.longDescription: DotClaude provides focused skills and shared rules for full-stack TypeScript, React, Supabase, Cloudflare, UI, testing, and quality workflows.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo against DotClaude conventions.
Set up project conventions for this TypeScript app.
Find AI slop and risky code in this change.
